calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Awards
Off Calendar Apr-16-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. EZEKIEL D. CARDER of Weinberg, Roger & Rosenfeld APC, Tel No. (510) 337-1001 appearing for the Petitioners;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD AND WESTERN STATES DRYWALL/LATHING INDUSTRY LABOR-MANAGEMENT COOPERATION COMMITTEE, INC.'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Awards is granted. No opposition filed. Petitioners awarded fees of $3000 and costs of $790. ORDER AFTER HEARING AND JUDGMENT BOTH SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Denise Doucette, CSR #5963 (302/HK)
